title: Captain Blood
actors: Errol Flynn, Olivia de Havilland, Lionel Atwill
plot: After treating a Monmouth rebel against King James II in 1680s England, a young Irish doctor is exiled as a slave to Jamaica where he captures a Spanish galleon and becomes the most feared pirate of the Caribbean.
awards: Nominated for 5 Oscars. 3 wins & 5 nominations total
